ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the applicant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the applicant */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the applicant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "quota_percentage" REAL /* Quota percentage for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_combinations" (
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each combination */,
  "combination_name" TEXT /* Name of the combination */,
  "subject1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first subject in the combination */,
  "subject2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second subject in the combination */,
  "subject3_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third subject in the combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_combinations_subject1_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject1_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_combinations_subject2_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject2_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_combinations_subject3_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject3_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who submitted the application */,
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject combination chosen by the applicant */,
  "application_number" TEXT /* Application number assigned to the candidate */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the applicant belongs */,
  "percentile_score" REAL /* Percentile score of the applicant */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_combination_id FOREIGN KEY ("combination_id") REFERENCES subject_combinations ("combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes regarding the application status */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who updated the application status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_progress_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_progress_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application to which the document belongs */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., resume, transcript, certificate) */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_documents_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)
